code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best: Option<Int> = None
  mut best_abs = 0

  while i <= n
    mut j = i
    while j < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        j = n + 1
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    end

    mut k = i
    while k < n
      let b2 = match string.byte_at(line, k)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b2 == 32 or b2 == 9 or b2 == 13
        k = n + 1
      else
        k = k + 1
      end
    end

    if k > i and k <= n
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, k)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs_int(v)
        match best
        when None
          best = Some(v)
          best_abs = a
        when Some(_)
          if a < best_abs
            best = Some(v)
            best_abs = a
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = k + 1
    else if k == n and k > i
      let tok2 = string.substring(line, i, k)
      match string.parse_int(tok2)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs_int(v)
        match best
        when None
          best = Some(v)
          best_abs = a
        when Some(_)
          if a < best_abs
            best = Some(v)
            best_abs = a
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = n + 1
    else
      i = i + 1
    end
  end

  match best
  when Some(v)
    println("min_abs=#{v}")
  when None
    println("min_abs=0")
  end
end
